name: Companhia CELG de Participacoes S/A
summary: Companhia CELG de Participa√É¬ß√É¬µes S/A engages in the generation and transmission of electricity. It has 3 small hydroelectric plants with an installed capacity of 18.68 MW, as well as a network of 722.6 km of 230 Kv lines and 11 substations. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Goiania, Brazil.
